category_sources: source_facts.description says rig provides fake name and address data; official homepage identifies it as the Random Identity Generator.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is RIG - The Random Identity Generator; source_facts.homepage points to that page.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the best available documentation surface for RIG.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.source-archive is a release tarball, not an official source-control repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies fake name/address data; current_curation.tags includes cli.
